arguments.content:
{
  "review_period_start": "2026-03-23T09:00:00-04:00",
  "review_period_end": "2026-03-24T18:00:00-04:00",
  "key_achievements": [
    "Aligned cross-functional stakeholders on API versioning strategy and v1 deprecation approach (target: end of Q2 2026)",
    "Finalized API v2.3 requirements: OAuth2 + JWT authentication and tier-based rate limits (free: 1000 req/hour; paid: 10,000 req/hour)",
    "Produced core communication and documentation artifacts: weekly tech report, PM change-notification email draft, formal API review notes, Sprint 8 technical spec, and ADR",
    "Captured and organized key technical debt items to inform backlog triage and Sprint planning"
  ],
  "lessons_learned": [
    "Versioning and deprecation decisions must be paired with concrete migration enablement (guide, endpoint mapping, FAQ, and proactive stakeholder comms) to reduce client disruption risk",
    "Auth and rate limiting are cross-cutting concerns best implemented as shared edge middleware with consistent error models and observability from day one",
    "Execution readiness improves when ownership is explicit (backend/frontend/devops action items) and staging/E2E environments are treated as first-class deliverables"
  ],
  "created_at": "2026-03-24T16:00:00-04:00"
}
